Bash(venv/Scripts/python -c "
import pymysql
conn = pymysql.connect\(host='127.0.0.1', port=3306, user='root', password='3728243aa!', database='alpha_desk_db'\)
cursor = conn.cursor\(\)
cursor.execute\(\\"SHOW COLUMNS FROM analysis_logs LIKE 'source_type'\\"\)
exists = cursor.fetchone\(\)
if not exists:
    cursor.execute\(\\"ALTER TABLE analysis_logs ADD COLUMN source_type VARCHAR\(20\) NULL DEFAULT 'NEWS' AFTER confidence\\"\)
    conn.commit\(\)
    print\('source_type 컬럼 추가 완료'\)
else:
    print\('source_type 컬럼 이미 존재'\)
conn.close\(\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(PYTHONPATH=. venv/Scripts/python -c "
import pymysql
conn = pymysql.connect\(host='127.0.0.1', port=3306, user='root', password='3728243aa!', database='alpha_desk_db'\)
cursor = conn.cursor\(\)
cursor.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM stocks'\)
count = cursor.fetchone\(\)[0]
print\(f'stocks 테이블 레코드 수: {count}'\)
if count > 0:
    cursor.execute\('SELECT symbol, name, market FROM stocks LIMIT 5'\)
    for row in cursor.fetchall\(\):
        print\(row\)
conn.close\(\)
" 2>&1)

import pymysql
